---
name: legacy-mapping
description: "Use when mapping legacy single-file HTML sections into modern routes, components, services, and reusable modules."
---

# Legacy Mapping

## Purpose
Translate monolithic legacy HTML/JS behavior into a maintainable application structure.

## Use When
- Breaking down a legacy page
- Planning migration of specific UI blocks
- Verifying feature parity

## Inputs
- Reference file under reference/
- Selected legacy section or workflow

## Output
- Route target
- Component list
- State model notes
- Service/API requirements
- Acceptance checks

## Mapping Template
- Legacy block:
- New route:
- New components:
- State and events:
- Data dependencies:
- Done criteria:

## Rules
- Keep one-to-one traceability from legacy behavior to new implementation.
- Separate UI rendering, state transitions, and data access.
- Record all inferred behavior as explicit assumptions.
